name: Environment-free Synthetic Data Generation for API-Calling Agents

description: arXiv:2607.16900v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Training API-calling large language model (LLM) agents demands massive amounts of high-quality trajectories. However, collecting such data at scale typically requires fully implemented environments with executable APIs and realistic, pre-populated backend databases, creating a major bottleneck for scalability. To overcome this, we propose an e...
author: Seanie Lee, Sanjoy Chowdhury, Chao Jiang, Cheng-Yu Hsieh, Ting-Yao Hu, Alexander T Toshev, Oncel Tuzel, Raviteja Vemulapalli
